mapper.select:
select `customerlnquiry_info`.* from `customerlnquiry_info`
where 1 = 1
and `customerlnquiry_info`.`name` like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
order by `customerlnquiry_info`.id

select `customerlnquiry_info`.* from `customerlnquiry_info` where 1 = 1
and `customerlnquiry_info`.`name` = #{name} or (`customerlnquiry_info`.`parentId` in ( select `customerlnquiry_info`.id from `customerlnquiry_info` where `customerlnquiry_info`.`name`= #{name}))
order by `customerlnquiry_info`.id
